title: Toy Box
description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Wax Relics[/gold]. Every [blue]3[/blue] combats, your left-most [gold]Wax Relic[/gold] will melt away.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Grants 4 Wax Relics on pickup. Every 3 combats, the left-most Wax Relic melts away. Becomes disabled once all 4 Wax Relics have melted (after 12 combats).
